title: Joe Errigo
compiled_truth: Joe Errigo is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (2000-05-11 to 2002-02-28), Joe Errigo sent 9 and received 566 emails, totalling 575 interactions. Top correspondents: [Don Baughman](people/don-baughman) (5), [Juan Hernandez](people/juan-hernandez) (4), [Corry Bentley](people/corry-bentley) (2), [John Kinser](people/john-kinser) (1). Mailbox folders observed: inbox, personal, power.
